latestReleaseNote.title: Pilot profile card, in-frame overlays, and rescue-flow polish
latestReleaseNote.summary: Added a fuller in-game pilot profile card with sign-in, reset-password, and flight-history surfaces, constrained the main popup windows to the gameplay frame with consistent dismiss controls, preserved released captured fighters through stage clear so dual-fighter joins are not skipped, and kept the native replay viewer, player guide, and launch-shell polish aligned for beta checkpoint testing.
